alpha.desc: The alpha view shows the rear of the residence|A rectangular pool, patio area, and landscaped lawn are visible behind the home|Trees and ornamental vegetation surround portions of the structure and provide separation from the surrounding open terrain.

bravo.desc: The bravo view shows the front of the residence|A circular driveway and landscaped entrance area provide access to multiple garage bays and entry points|Mature trees line portions of the driveway and partially obscure the lower elevations of the home

charlie.desc: The charlie view shows the residence from the northwest|The circular driveway, garage structures, and rear pool area are visible from this angle|Landscaping and tree cover are concentrated around the home, contrasting with the surrounding undeveloped land.

delta.desc: The delta view shows the rear and eastern side of the residence|The pool, patio, lawn, and landscaped walkways are visible behind the structure|Several detached structures can be observed adjacent to the main residence, while open terrain surrounds the developed portion of the property.

nadir.desc: The nadir view shows a large residence situated near the center of an open parcel|A long paved driveway connects the home to the roadway and terminates in a circular turnaround in front of the structure|A pool and landscaped lawn area are located behind the residence|Several detached structures are visible around the home, while the surrounding property consists primarily of open ground with scattered trees and shrubs.
